backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining the backend canister with data types and CRUD operations for posts, college connects, wishlists, user profiles, student profiles, DMs, community chat, and feedback, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and blob storage via MixinStorage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report declaring that the standalone self-contained HTML file (frontend/public/standalone.html) has been implemented, mapping it to its test ID and component dependencies.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing their purpose, styling tokens, and key functionality for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes covering background, foreground, card, primary, border, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app with the title 'Mem Nerchukunnavi', favicon, viewport meta, Open Graph tags, and a root div mounting the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/public/standalone.html: Self-contained single-file static demo of the full application using Tailwind CDN, Google Fonts, inline styles, and hardcoded mock data — runs without any backend canister or build toolchain.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up TanStack Router with eight routes, wrapped in ThemeProvider, QueryClientProvider, and ToastProvider, with a route-change sound effect via RouteChangeSound.
Presentational component rendering a single community chat message with an avatar initial, author name, college year badge (violet/neutral styled), relative timestamp, and message text.
frontend/src/components/CollegeConnectFo: A form component that allows users to submit college tips by entering a college name, year, and tip text (max 200 chars), with submission handled via a mutation hook and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/CollegeConnectLi: Displays a scrollable list of submitted college tips with college name, year badge, tip text, and relative timestamps, with loading skeleton and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/DMConversationPa: A modal panel for direct messaging between two users, showing conversation history with chat-bubble styling and a text input for sending new messages.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: A form component for submitting platform feedback with name, year, and feedback text (max 500 chars), using a mutation hook and toast notifications on success or failure.
Displays a scrollable list of user feedback entries with author avatar, name, year badge, and relative timestamp, with loading, error, and empty state handling.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper providing a responsive navigation pill with links to all app routes, a mute/unmute sound toggle, a mobile hamburger menu, and a background particle effect.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: A clickable card component for displaying a post with category and year badges, truncated content, upvote/connect counts, and a bookmark toggle with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/ShareButtons.tsx: Renders share buttons for an individual post, supporting copy link, WhatsApp share, and native Web Share API, with toast notifications and sound effects.
frontend/src/components/ShareWebsiteButt: Renders share buttons for the overall website (not a specific post), supporting copy link, WhatsApp, and native share, with toast feedback.
frontend/src/components/SparkParticles.t: Renders a fixed background layer of animated pill-shaped particles in violet and neutral colors using a seeded deterministic layout across a 4x4 grid.
frontend/src/components/StudentCard.tsx: Displays a student profile card with avatar, name, college, year badge, availability status, and a DM button that triggers a callback.
frontend/src/components/StudentRegistrat: Form component for registering a student profile with name, college, year, and DM availability toggle, submitting via the useRegisterStudent mutation.
frontend/src/components/ToastContainer.t: Renders a fixed bottom-right stack of toast notifications with success, error, and info styles and individual dismiss buttons.
frontend/src/components/YearSelectionMod: Modal dialog for selecting a college year (1st–4th), displaying styled cards with emoji and subtitle, persisting the selection via useYearSelection.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for toggling between English and Telugu languages, persisting the choice in sessionStorage and exposing a translation helper t().
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, initializing it with the user's Internet Identity or anonymously, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to expose login, logout, and identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including posts, stats, wishlist, and college connect features via the canister actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useToast.ts: Implements a React context-based toast notification system with show and dismiss functionality, auto-dismissing toasts after 3.5 seconds.
frontend/src/hooks/useWishlist.ts: Provides session-based wishlist state management for a given post, using sessionStorage for a persistent session key and toggling save/unsave via query mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useYearSelection.ts: Manages college year and college name selections persisted in sessionStorage, exposing getters and setters for both values.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and adds utility styles like grid backgrounds and animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Static About page displaying the platform's mission, feature highlights, and a call-to-action to share experiences, along with social share buttons.
frontend/src/pages/AvailableStudents.tsx: Displays a list of students open to DMs, with a registration form to mark yourself available and a DM conversation panel that prompts for the sender's name before opening a chat.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityChat.tsx: Renders a public community chat room where students can post messages with their name and year, with auto-scroll to the latest message and a 200-character limit.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Shows a community dashboard with student feedback forms, post statistics (total posts, category counts), and top upvoted posts, plus a college connect section.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Landing page that displays filterable posts by category and academic year, shows a year-selection modal on first visit, and includes a hero section with navigation CTAs.
frontend/src/pages/PostDetail.tsx: Renders a detailed view of a single post by ID, including category badge, author year, bookmark/wishlist toggle, and share buttons, with loading and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/ShareExperience.tsx: React page component for submitting a new post, allowing users to select a category, college year, and write content, then submit via the createPost mutation with toast feedback and sound effects.
frontend/src/pages/Wishlist.tsx: React page that displays a user's bookmarked posts by cross-referencing wishlist IDs from the session with all fetched posts, showing loading skeletons and an empty state if none are saved.
frontend/src/translations/index.ts: Defines English and Telugu translation strings for the entire app, covering navigation, categories, modals, share page, home page, and post-related UI text.
frontend/src/utils/sounds.ts: Provides Web Audio API-based sound utilities including a bubble-pop tone and a typing tick noise, with mute state persisted in sessionStorage.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Inter, Sora), a violet/neutral color palette, custom shadows, border radii, and floating spark keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks project metadata and feature requests, noting a pending task to consolidate the full application into a single self-contained standalone HTML file.
